overall.description: A third-person game scene depicting a medieval character walking through a snowy landscape at night toward a large stone castle. The character approaches the fortified gate, passes through the archway into a tunnel passage, and stops at a barred metal gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy approach path to medieval castle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-dusted path toward the distant castle fortress

entered.detail: large stone fortress with multiple towers and crenellated walls visible against the night sky
main entrance archway of the castle with heavy stone construction
snow-covered evergreen tree standing on the right side of the path
rocky ground with patches of snow lining the approach path
clear night sky with visible stars above the castle silhouette

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy landscape at night, approaching a massive medieval castle in the distance. Snow-dusted pine trees line the path while the starry sky remains visible overhead.

events.description: character passes under the stone archway into the enclosed castle gate tunnel
character slows and stops at the barred metal gate blocking the inner entrance

agents.ego_description: passing through the outer gate archway into the stone tunnel and approaching the inner barred gate

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone wall of the gate tunnel passage on the left side
rough-hewn stone wall of the gate tunnel passage on the right side
large barred metal gate with vertical bars blocking the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters the castle through the stone archway into a narrow tunnel passage. The open sky and trees disappear as rough stone walls enclose the path, leading to a barred metal gate at the tunnel's end where the character stops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, snowy wilderness into the claustrophobic confines of a castle fortification. It begins with the character walking through an open nocturnal landscape, passing snow-dusted pine trees under a clear, starry sky while approaching a massive stone castle. As the character reaches the perimeter, the wide horizon vanishes and the scene shifts abruptly as they pass through a heavy stone archway. The open air is replaced by the oppressive enclosure of a narrow tunnel passage with rough stone walls. The camera finally follows the character to a complete halt before a barred metal gate that blocks the end of the passage.
